hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

commands.name: deb
commands.description: Creates .deb from a directory with the contents. Everything is inferred. For .NET applications, this is usually the "publish" directory.

commands.name: appimage
commands.description: Creates AppImage from a directory with the contents. Everything is inferred. For .NET applications, this is usually the "publish" directory.

commands.name: appdir
commands.description: Creates an AppDir from a directory (does not package an .AppImage). For .NET apps, pass the publish directory.

commands.name: from-appdir
commands.description: Creates an AppImage from an existing AppDir directory.
